data.title: CyberArk Stock Poised To Surge Nearly 22%, Says BofA: 'Metrics Show Continued Execution On All Fronts'
data.description: Bank of America Securities analyst, Madeline Brooks, has increased the price target for CyberArk Software (NASDAQ: CYBR) by $145 to $500, indicating a potential surge in the company's shares.

data.title: Mark Zuckerberg Offloads Meta Shares Worth $14.4 Million In February
data.description: Mark Zuckerberg sells $14.4M in Meta stock through CZI Holdings LLC, part of pre-established trading plan.

data.title: Faraday Future Goes All-In On AI: New Hires, Open AI Day And More
data.description: Faraday Future, a company focused on AI-driven strategy, is recruiting AI specialists and changing its Nasdaq ticker on March 10, 2025.

data.title: EXCLUSIVE: Alzamend Neuro Says Tesla Dynamic Completes Head Coil To Measure Brain Structure Lithium Levels
data.description: Alzamend Neuro developed a head coil for high-resolution brain imaging in Phase 2 trials, aiming to optimize lithium dosing for neurological conditions.
